results.title: India-EU trade pact to be signed by Dec; implemented from Feb-March next year
results.description: NEW DELHI, June 21: India and the 27-nation European Union will sign the free trade agreement by December and are likely to implement the pact during February- March next year, Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal said on Sunday. On January 27 this year, India and the EU announced the conclusion of negotiations for the [...]

results.title: Sona Mohapatra says all heartbreak songs in Bollywood are ‘reserved for men’, gives example of Arijit Singh's Zaalima
results.description: Sona Mohapatra says she was flabbergasted by the song Zaalima where the female voice only comes in the end and all the rest of the song is for the male singer.

results.title: Is Claude AI down? API 529 overloaded errors hit coding tasks and Claude Code
results.description: Claude AI appears to be experiencing issues, with users reporting widespread API 529 "Overloaded" errors that are disrupting coding tasks.

results.title: Cabo Verde draw 2-2 with Uruguay in FIFA World Cup 2026 match
results.description: Cabo Verde made history with a 2-2 draw against Uruguay in their World Cup 2026 debut, showcasing a remarkable performance at Miami Stadium.

results.title: Sound meets smart functionality
results.description: Blaupunkt and Tempt bring entertainment and utility to the wireless audio segment
